channel.title: SSbreakingSectionTwo
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingSectionTwo, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Data Centers Pairing Batteries with Gas Generators to Manage AI Power Demands
item.description: As AI increases strain on the electrical grid, data center operators are combining battery storage with natural gas generators to maintain reliable power supply.

item.title: Cohere's European Expansion Signals Growth of AI Powers Outside US and China
item.description: Cohere's partnership with German-backed Aleph Alpha points to a growing bloc of AI companies positioning themselves between dominant US and Chinese players.

item.title: How Amazon Rebuilt Its Podcast Division Around Creators Like the Kelce Brothers
item.description: After restructuring its podcast operations, Amazon built a new division centered on creator ownership, with NFL stars Jason and Travis Kelce among its first flagship partners.

item.title: Disputed Military Jet Deal and US Pressure Prompt Resignations in Peru's Government
item.description: US pressure helped advance a contested jet purchase deal in Peru, triggering government resignations and raising concerns about national sovereignty.

item.title: Turkey Passes Law Barring Children Under 15 from Social Media Platforms
item.description: Turkey's parliament passed legislation prohibiting children under 15 from using social media, pending presidential signature, with supporters citing child protection and critics raising free speech concerns.
